cit.note: Federal Decree-Law No. 47 of 2022; effective for financial years starting on/after 1 June 2023. 0% up to AED 375,000, 9% above. DMTT 15% applies to MNE groups with consolidated revenue >= EUR 750M from periods on/after 1 January 2025.

personal_income_tax.note: No federal personal income tax on employment income.

end_of_service_gratuity.note: Private-sector end-of-service benefit under Federal Decree-Law No. 33 of 2021 (UAE Labour Law); 21 days' basic wage per year for the first 5 years, 30 days per year thereafter.

official_sources.name: UAE Federal Tax Authority — Corporate Tax
UAE Ministry of Finance — Corporate Tax

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, Free Zone qualifying-income conditions, DMTT/Pillar Two, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
